mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS allOrders, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cancelledOrders, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completedOrders, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS deliveredOrders, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS waitingOrders FROM orders WHERE order_time >= #{begin} AND order_time < #{end}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IF(status = 1, 1, 0)), 0) AS sold, IFNULL(SUM(IF(status = 0, 1, 0)), 0) AS discontinued FROM dish
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IF(status = 1, 1, 0)), 0) AS sold, IFNULL(SUM(IF(status = 0, 1, 0)), 0) AS discontinued FROM setmeal
